title: Adaptive Defenses Are an Attack Surface
excerpt: Securing AI agents — adaptive defenses are themselves an attack surface, and the agent action layer needs detection, not just prevention.
bodyHtml:
Securing AI agents — adaptive defenses are themselves an attack surface, and the agent action layer needs detection, not just prevention.

Work in progress. This post tracks the reproduction of AdaptiveGuard (ASE 2025) and the attempt to poison its continual-learning loop by shaping the drift that triggers retraining. Notes, failed attempts, and any working exploits will land here as the research ships.
